articles.title: Arizona can pursue charges against Kalshi, judge rules
articles.summary: A federal judge cleared the way for Arizona to pursue criminal charges against prediction market Kalshi, likely related to election betting activities in the state. The ruling signals states are getting serious about enforcing their own gambling laws against prediction markets, which could force platforms to navigate a patchwork of state regulations even when they have federal approval.

articles.title: Prediction markets under fire as lawmakers push for crackdown
articles.summary: Lawmakers are mounting a regulatory assault on prediction markets, likely targeting their rapid growth and mainstream adoption. If successful, this crackdown could force platforms to restrict access, limit bet sizes, or shut down entirely in key jurisdictions.

articles.title: Analysts See 100% Upside in Flutter Stock Despite Prediction-Market Pressure
articles.summary: Flutter stock analysts are calling for 100% upside despite mounting pressure from prediction market operations. The bullish calls suggest Wall Street still sees massive growth potential in the gambling giant even as regulatory scrutiny intensifies around political betting platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket.

articles.title: Arch Manning, CJ Carr, and a Wide-Open Field: Kalshi's Heisman Trophy Market Heading Into the 2026 Season
articles.summary: Kalshi's 2026 Heisman Trophy market is heating up with Arch Manning and CJ Carr emerging as early favorites in what appears to be a wide-open race two years out. The early action suggests bettors are already spotting value in a market where traditional powerhouse programs don't have obvious lock candidates, creating opportunities for sharp money to get ahead of public sentiment.

articles.title: Masters Prediction Market Apps: Get 5 Best Offers for Augusta
articles.summary: Several prediction market apps are rolling out special promotions and enhanced betting options for the Masters Tournament at Augusta National. These Augusta-specific offers signal how platforms are using golf's biggest events to attract new users and test features before expanding to year-round markets.

articles.title: Iran Ceasefire Wreaks Havoc on Prediction Markets
articles.summary: Iran's unexpected ceasefire announcement sent shockwaves through prediction markets, with traders scrambling to adjust positions on Middle East conflict duration and oil price futures. The sudden policy shift caught most bettors off guard, creating massive swings in geopolitical betting odds and highlighting how quickly consensus predictions can crumble when real-world events move faster than market sentiment.

articles.title: Why Does Polymarket Have a Waitlist (& How to Bypass It Today)
articles.summary: Polymarket is restricting new user access through a waitlist system, though workarounds exist for those who want immediate entry. The gatekeeping creates artificial scarcity that could drive up user demand while potentially limiting market liquidity and price discovery on the platform's political and news betting markets.

articles.title: Prediction Markets: Do Networks Need More Transparency About How They Work? 04/09/2026
articles.summary: Networks are facing growing pressure to reveal the inner workings of their prediction market algorithms and data feeds. Better transparency could help bettors spot manipulation and biased pricing, but it might also give savvy traders unfair advantages over casual players.

articles.title: Bank of America Sees a $1.1 Trillion Market for Sports Event Betting in US
articles.summary: Bank of America analysts project the US sports betting market could reach $1.1 trillion in total handle, a massive expansion from current levels that signals the industry's explosive growth potential. This validates what prediction market operators already know: Americans have an enormous appetite for putting money behind their opinions, and sports betting's mainstream acceptance creates a pathway for more sophisticated forecasting markets to follow.

articles.title: Binance enters prediction markets arena via Predict.fun integration
articles.summary: Binance has integrated with Predict.fun, bringing prediction markets to its massive user base of crypto traders. This gives prediction markets access to serious liquidity and mainstream crypto adoption, potentially dwarfing the current niche playerbase.

articles.title: WATCH: Kalshi founders talk insider trading, gambling, Don Jr. on "The Axios Show"
articles.summary: Kalshi's founders appeared on "The Axios Show" to address controversies around insider trading allegations, gambling regulations, and Donald Trump Jr.'s involvement with the platform. The interview likely signals Kalshi's push to legitimize prediction markets amid regulatory scrutiny and public skepticism about whether these platforms are sophisticated forecasting tools or glorified betting sites.

articles.title: Insider Trading in Prediction Markets Poses Compliance Risks
articles.summary: Prediction markets are wrestling with insider trading scandals as traders with privileged information skew odds and undermine market integrity. Regulators are now eyeing these platforms more closely, which could mean stricter rules and compliance costs that change how prediction markets operate.
